problem id: a50e5d7e
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(7) OR SHR(4)

examples:
  01010110 -> 00101111
  01000101 -> 10100110
  11100010 -> 01111111
  11010111 -> 11101111
  11111011 -> 11111111
  11110110 -> 01111111
  10001011 -> 11001101
  01011101 -> 10101111
  01101001 -> 10110110

query: 01101011
predicted answer: 10110111
